How it began

Our Story

September 2, 2025

A Message That Almost Went Unread

Shagun found Krutarth’s profile on Shaadi.com and reached out. He almost dismissed it as spam. Good thing he looked twice.

September 2, 2025, Midnight

7.5 Hours on the Phone

Their first call lasted from midnight Toronto time until 7:30 AM. Krutarth went straight to work without sleeping, and knew by the end of the call she was the one.

September 3, 2025

When You Know, You Know

After less than 24 hours, Krutarth called his family to tell them about Shagun. Both families spoke that evening and it went beautifully.

September 11, 2025

Birthday Flowers from Surrey

Shagun sent Krutarth flowers all the way from Surrey for his birthday, a sweet reminder that distance was no obstacle for these two.

September 19, 2025

The Airport Surprise

Just 17 days after their first message, Krutarth flew to Vancouver. Shagun surprised him at the airport. Their first meeting was everything they'd hoped for.

Diwali, 2025

She Came to Toronto

Shagun visited Krutarth in Toronto for Diwali. The festival of lights, a perfect backdrop for a love story this bright.

November 8, 2025

He Proposed

Krutarth got down on one knee. She said yes.

November 11, 2025, at 11:11 AM

Married: 69 Days Later

Their court ceremony took place on 11/11 at exactly 11:11 AM, just 69 days after it all began. The officiant pronounced them married at that exact moment.

April 14, 2026

The Big Fat Indian Wedding

Two days of celebrations in Ahmedabad with family, friends, and every tradition in full glory. Mehndi, Sangeet, Haldi, & the Full Ceremonial Wedding.

Be part of our day

Krutarth & Shagun

April 14, 2026 · Ahmedabad

♥
April 13–14, 2026 · Ahmedabad

Wedding Celebrations

Monday, April 13 · Orient Club, Ahmedabad
10:00 AM
🌿Mehndi & Lunch
Henna, laughter, and friendly face-offs. Bring your A game to mingle with the Ladki wale!
Outfit Inspo: Hues of the Forest
5:30 PM
💍Teeka & Chunni
An evening of celebration in honour of Krutarth & Shagun, hosted by Suhani & Avijit.
7:00 PM
💎Ring Ceremony
The formal exchange of rings.
8:00 PM
💃Sangeet & Dinner
Dancing the night away, onwards into the evening!
Outfit Inspo: Glam!
Tuesday, April 14 · The Wedding Day
9:00 AM
🌼Phoolon Wali Haldi at Orient Club
Shower Krutarth & Shagun with blessings and flower petals. Dance to the dhol and celebrate a vibrant morning!
Outfit Inspo: Rang Barse!
6:00 PM
🥁Baraat at Arya Grand
The groom’s procession arrives. Come cheer for Krutarth!
8:00 PM
🍺Jay Maala
The joyful garland exchange, the first moment of the wedding ceremony.
8:30 PM
🍽️Dinner & Reception
Celebrate with family and friends over a grand dinner.
Midnight
🔥Phere
The sacred seven rounds around the fire, the moment Krutarth & Shagun become one.
